query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A monochrome profile portrait of a man with a shaved head, facing left against a solid black background. A narrow band of light illuminates a strip of his forehead, the bridge of his nose, his eye, and his lips, revealing skin texture and facial contours, while the rest of his face and body recedes into complete darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A monochrome profile portrait of a man with a shaved head against a solid black background, deliberately underexposed so that crushing shadows consume nearly his entire face. Only a thin sliver of light reveals his forehead, nose, eye, and lips, creating an oppressive, somber atmosphere that evokes unease and dread through extreme tonal manipulation and atmospheric distress.
